name: Gwendolyn Price
description:
A night presumed to be full of partying and alcohol doesn't go as planned, as Gwendolyn finds herself bordering insanity, seeing this shadowy figure all around. The Rat Man, she tells herself, feeling foolish for even assuming that urban legend to be true. Maybe it's all in her head, maybe it's all the booze. Maybe it's not. Maybe he's real. Gwendolyn can't tell what's real or not anymore.

V.1.2

Previous update: Fixed typos

Read more about the Rat Man in the personality section if you're interested

(Artwork by @ellizary)
creator: closeted_furry
